summary: Comprehensive testing of NotaryChain Phase 2-3 features: Shareable Verification Badge, ANAN Phase 2 (Dynamic Fraud Intelligence), and ANAN Phase 3 (Agent Reputation & Self-Tuning). Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified including badge modal, fraud patterns, RON rules, and agent reputation.
test_credentials: admin@notarychain.com / Admin123!, notarytest@test.com / Test123!, demo@test.com / Demo123!
seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded: 8 fraud patterns (4 critical, 4 high), 8 RON rules (7 enabled, 1 disabled - California)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully tested and working. Badge endpoint /api/anan/badge/{id}/json is PUBLIC (no auth). Fraud patterns and RON rules are pre-seeded on server startup. Agent reputation shows 0% accuracy with 0 samples (expected - ceremonies created before tracking code). Weight tuning requires minimum 5 samples.

fraud_stats_context.test_fraud_stats: PASS - Returns 8 active, 4 critical, 7 RON enabled, 1 disabled
fraud_stats_context.test_fraud_context_florida_affidavit: PASS - Returns fraud alerts + RON rules
fraud_stats_context.test_fraud_context_california_warning: PASS - Shows RON not authorized warning

badge.test_get_badge_json_public: PASS - Public endpoint works without auth

reputation.test_get_agent_reputations: PASS - Returns all 3 agents with accuracy stats

anan_page.agent_reputation_section: PASS - Shows Verifier, Witness, Sealer with accuracy bars
anan_page.fraud_intelligence_link: PASS - Shows '8 fraud patterns, 8 RON jurisdictions'
anan_page.escalation_queue: PASS - Shows pending escalations with Approve/Reject

fraud_intelligence_page.tabs: PASS - Fraud Patterns (8) and RON Rules (8)
fraud_intelligence_page.create_form: PASS - Category, Severity, Title, Description, Indicators fields

badge_modal.badge_preview: PASS - Shows VERIFIED badge with NotaryChain
badge_modal.static_html_section: PASS - Shows HTML code with Copy button
badge_modal.dynamic_js_section: PASS - Shows JS widget code with Copy button

key_findings.all_features_working: All 3 features (Badge, Fraud Intel, Reputation) fully functional
key_findings.pre_seeded_data: 8 fraud patterns and 8 RON rules seeded on startup
key_findings.reputation_tracking: 0 samples currently - ceremonies created before tracking code
key_findings.california_ron_disabled: Only CA has ron_enabled=false as expected
